mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.wishlist_flat WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT wishlist_item_id as "id", user_id as "userId", product_id as "productId", variant_id as "variantId", product_name as "productName", brand as "brand", sku as "sku", image_url as "imageUrl", category_name as "categoryName", added_at as "addedAt", price_when_added as "priceWhenAdded", current_price as "currentPrice", notify_on_price_drop as "notifyOnPriceDrop", available_quantity as "availableQuantity", stock_status as "stockStatus", notes as "notes" FROM hm_query.wishlist_flat WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY added_at DESC ${pagination}

SELECT wishlist_item_id as "id", user_id as "userId", product_id as "productId", variant_id as "variantId", product_name as "productName", price_when_added as "priceWhenAdded", current_price as "currentPrice" FROM hm_query.wishlist_flat WHERE notify_on_price_drop = true AND current_price < price_when_added
